reviews.author: Emily J.
reviews.content: Extremely professional and knowledgeable about antique valuation. The appraisal was thorough and delivered on time.

reviews.author: Sarah T.
reviews.content: Excellent service from start to finish. I highly recommend Asian/Persian Decorative Arts for any antique appraisal needs.

reviews.author: Michael M.
reviews.content: They took the time to explain the historical significance of my antique pieces and provided a thorough valuation process.

reviews.author: Susan A.
reviews.content: Their knowledge of antique furniture values was exceptional. The documentation they provided was detailed and perfect for my insurance needs.

reviews.author: David D.
reviews.content: They took the time to explain the historical significance of my antique pieces and provided a thorough valuation process.

content.about: Waddington's Auctioneers & Appraisers is one of Canada's premier auction houses, offering expert antique and fine art appraisal services from their Broadview Avenue location in Toronto. With over 40 years of experience, they provide valuations for insurance, estate, and donation purposes.

appraisers.name: A.J. Yuen Personal Property & Antique Appraisals

content.about: A.J. Yuen is an ISA Accredited Member and USPAP Compliant Fine Art Appraiser based in Toronto, serving as Director of ISA's Canadian Chapter. Specializing in personal property and antique appraisals, with expertise through Meca Gallery.
content.notes: Director of ISA Canadian Chapter. Contact through mecagallery.ca.

content.about: Empire Appraisers are Toronto-based certified appraisers of art, antiques, general contents, and collections with over 38 years of hands-on experience. They serve clients throughout the Greater Toronto Area for insurance, estate, donation, and resale valuations.
content.notes: 38+ years of hands-on experience. Website: empireappraisers.com

content.about: Susan Selby is an ISA Member and Generalist Appraiser based in Toronto, specializing in antiques, furnishings, decorative arts, fine art, antique toys, Canadiana, and household contents. Active member of the International Society of Appraisers Canadian Chapter.
content.notes: ISA Canadian Chapter member. Generalist appraiser with broad expertise across antiques and decorative arts.
